channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Odyssey â the Twisted Epic We Deserve
item.description: Christopher Nolan's unheroic epic transforms the way movies are experienced.

item.title: Rubio Highlights Growing Concern Over Left-Wing Violence and Extortion
item.description: Accounts from Marco Rubio and Democrat Adam Smith underscore the seriousness of the threat. Will progressives take notice?

item.title: Seven Strategies DSA Aims to Use to Transform America Into a Communist State
item.description: DSA candidates are gaining momentum in the U.S., winning key elections nationwide.

item.title: New D.C. Museum Highlights National Geographic's Shift From Patriotic Exploration to Global Activism
item.description: An exhibit openly stated that National Geographic's mission evolved as climate concerns grew among Americans.
